name: qnexus

metadata.name: qnexus
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License

documentation:
# qnexus

[Quantinuum Nexus](https://nexus.quantinuum.com) python client.


```python
import qnexus as qnx

# Will open a browser window to login with Nexus credentials
qnx.login()

# Dataframe representation of all your pending jobs in Nexus
qnx.jobs.get_all(job_status=["SUBMITTED", "QUEUED", "RUNNING"]).df()
```

Full documentation available at https://docs.quantinuum.com/nexus

Copyright 2024 Quantinuum Ltd.

methods.name: qnexus.models.job_status.JobStatus.df
documentation: Present in a pandas DataFrame.

The status of a job along with an optional description.

Optionally can also include extra fields such as:
* Detailed error information.
* Timestamps for changes in status.
* Queue position.

modules.name: qnexus.context
documentation: Functions for managing context in the client.

functions.name: qnexus.context.deactivate_project
documentation: Deactivate a project from the current context.

functions.name: qnexus.context.deactivate_properties
documentation: Deactivate the current properties.

functions.name: qnexus.context.get_active_project
documentation:
Get a reference to the active project if set.

```pycon
>>> get_active_project()
```

```pycon
>>> from qnexus.models.annotations import Annotations
>>> token = set_active_project_token(
... ProjectRef(id="dca33f7f-9619-4cf7-a3fb-56256b117d6e",
... annotations=Annotations(name="example")))
>>> get_active_project()
ProjectRef(
    id=UUID('dca33f7f-9619-4cf7-a3fb-56256b117d6e'),
    annotations=Annotations(name='example', description=None, properties=OrderedDict())
)
```

```pycon
>>> deactivate_project(token)
```

functions.name: qnexus.context.get_active_properties
documentation:
Get the keys and values of the currently active properties.

```pycon
>>> get_active_properties()
OrderedDict()
```

```pycon
>>> token = update_active_properties_token(foo=3, bar=True)
>>> get_active_properties()
OrderedDict([('foo', 3), ('bar', True)])
```

```pycon
>>> deactivate_properties(token)
```

functions.name: qnexus.context.set_active_project_token
documentation:
Globally set a project as active,
returning a Token to the ProjectRef in the context.

functions.name: qnexus.context.set_active_project
documentation: Globally set a project as active.

functions.name: qnexus.context.update_active_properties_token
documentation:
Globally update and merge properties with the existing ones,
returning a token to the PropertiesDict in the context.

functions.name: qnexus.context.update_active_properties
documentation: Globally update and merge properties with the existing ones.

functions.name: qnexus.context.using_project
documentation:
Attach a ProjectRef to the current context.

All operations in the context will make use of the project.

```pycon
>>> from qnexus.models.annotations import Annotations
>>> project = ProjectRef(
... id="cd325b9c-d4a2-4b6e-ae58-8fad89749fac",
... annotations=Annotations(name="example"))
>>> with using_project(project):
...     get_active_project()
ProjectRef(
    id=UUID('cd325b9c-d4a2-4b6e-ae58-8fad89749fac'),
    annotations=Annotations(name='example', description=None, properties=OrderedDict())
)
```

```pycon
>>> get_active_project()
```

functions.name: qnexus.context.using_properties
documentation: Attach properties to the current context.

functions.name: qnexus.context.merge_project_from_context
documentation:
Decorator to merge a project from the context.
ProjectRef in kwargs takes precedence (will be selected).

functions.name: qnexus.context.merge_properties_from_context
documentation:
Decorator to take the union of properties from the context with
any provided in kwargs. Properties in kwargs take precendence.

functions.name: qnexus.client.jobs.results
documentation: Get the ResultRefs from a JobRef, if the job is complete.

functions.name: qnexus.client.jobs.retry_submission
documentation:
Retry a job in Nexus according to status(es) or retry strategy.

By default, jobs with the ERROR status will be retried.

functions.name: qnexus.client.jobs.cancel
documentation:
Attempt cancellation of a job in Nexus.

If the job has been submitted to a backend, Nexus will request cancellation of the job.

functions.name: qnexus.client.jobs.compile
documentation:
Utility method to run a compile job on a circuit or circuits and return a
DataframableList of the compiled circuits.

functions.name: qnexus.client.jobs.execute
documentation:
Utility method to run an execute job and return the results. Blocks until
the results are available. See `qnexus.start_execute_job` for a function
that submits the job and returns immediately, rather than waiting for
results.

classes.name: qnexus.client.jobs.RemoteRetryStrategy
documentation:
Strategy to use when retrying jobs.

Each strategy defines how the system should approach resolving
potential conflicts with remote state.

DEFAULT will only attempt to re-sync status and collect results
from the third party. Duplicate results will not be saved.

ALLOW_RESUBMIT will submit the job to the third party again if
# the system has no record of a third party handle.

FORCE_RESUBMIT will submit the job to the third party again if
the system has a job handle already but no result.

FULL_RESTART will act as though the job is entirely fresh and
re-perform every action.

functions.name: qnexus.cli.utils.add_options_to_command
documentation: Add click options using fields of a pydantic model.
# QNX utils interface
@click.command()
@is_documented_by(_status)
def status():
click.echo(_status())
@click.command()
def init():
"""Initialize a new qnexus project."""
if config:
raise click.ClickException(
Fore.GREEN + f"Project already initialized: {Fore.YELLOW}"
if config is None:
name: str = click.prompt(
"Enter a project name:",
default=current_dir,
click.echo(Fore.GREEN + f"Intialized qnexus project: {name}")
